title: Grilled Slovakian Apple
description: A smoky twist on traditional Slovakian desserts, featuring caramelized apples grilled to perfection.
instructions: 1. Peel, core, and slice the apple into wedges.
2. In a small bowl, mix together the sugar and cinnamon.
3. Brush the apple wedges with butter and then coat with the sugar mixture.
4. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
5. Place the apple wedges on the grill and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until caramelized.
6. Serve warm, topped with additional sugar and cinnamon if desired.
